author: DominicVainMod
content:
@All Pings 

Star Atlas DAO - Vote on PIPs 1 and 2

Voting for founding POLIS Improvement Proposals 1 and 2 is now live until July 23!

 PIP-1 aims to ratify the on-chain governance processes of the Star Atlas DAO.
 PIP-2 focuses on ratifying the operations of the Star Atlas Foundation.

 | Vote now: https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals
